description: You are an architectural visualization artist working on a building façade. The scene contains a solid 'Wall' object and three red cutter objects ('WindowCutter_Left', 'WindowCutter_Right', 'DoorCutter') positioned where openings should be. Use the cutter objects to create permanent openings in the 'Wall' and ensure the cutters are no longer visible in the viewport or final render. Render the scene from the current camera view to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wall_render.png and save the Blender project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/wall_with_openings.blend. The desktop session is active and Blender is open with the scene loaded.
